name: 2020 Corner Bracket, L-Shape
description: Zinc alloy L-shaped corner bracket for 2020 aluminum extrusion profiles, 90-degree joint connection, M5 bolt mounting, 20x20x20mm compact form factor for right-angle frame construction
designNotes: Standard L-bracket for joining two 2020 extrusions at 90 degrees. Requires two M5 bolts and matching T-nuts. Compact design fits within the 20mm profile envelope.

name: 2020 Inside Corner Bracket, T-Shape
description: Zinc alloy T-shaped inside corner bracket for 2020 aluminum extrusion profiles, 3-way T-joint connection, M5 bolt mounting with 3 fastener points, 20x20x28mm for three-way frame junctions
designNotes: Inside corner bracket for creating T-junctions with three 2020 extrusions. Three M5 bolt holes allow secure three-way connections at frame intersections.

name: 2020 Cross Plate Bracket, 4-Way
description: Zinc alloy flat cross plate bracket for 2020 aluminum extrusion profiles, 4-way cross joint connection, M5 bolt mounting with 4 fastener points, 60x60x4mm thin plate for planar cross junctions
designNotes: Flat cross plate for joining four 2020 extrusions in a planar cross pattern. Thin 4mm profile keeps the joint flush. Four M5 bolt holes provide secure 4-way connections.

name: 3030 Corner Bracket, L-Shape
description: Zinc alloy L-shaped corner bracket for 3030 aluminum extrusion profiles, 90-degree joint connection, M6 bolt mounting, 28x28x28mm for right-angle frame construction on 30mm series profiles
designNotes: Standard L-bracket for joining two 3030 extrusions at 90 degrees. Requires two M6 bolts and matching T-nuts. Sized to fit the 30mm profile series.

name: 3030 Inside Corner Bracket, T-Shape
description: Zinc alloy T-shaped inside corner bracket for 3030 aluminum extrusion profiles, 3-way T-joint connection, M6 bolt mounting with 3 fastener points, 28x28x38mm for three-way frame junctions on 30mm series
designNotes: Inside corner bracket for creating T-junctions with three 3030 extrusions. Three M6 bolt holes allow secure three-way connections at frame intersections.

name: 3030 Cross Plate Bracket, 4-Way
description: Zinc alloy flat cross plate bracket for 3030 aluminum extrusion profiles, 4-way cross joint connection, M6 bolt mounting with 4 fastener points, 80x80x4mm thin plate for planar cross junctions on 30mm series
designNotes: Flat cross plate for joining four 3030 extrusions in a planar cross pattern. Thin 4mm profile keeps the joint flush. Four M6 bolt holes provide secure 4-way connections.

name: 4040 Corner Bracket, L-Shape
description: Die-cast aluminum L-shaped corner bracket for 4040 aluminum extrusion profiles, 90-degree joint connection, M8 bolt mounting, 35x35x35mm heavy-duty right-angle frame construction
designNotes: Heavy-duty L-bracket for joining two 4040 extrusions at 90 degrees. Die-cast aluminum construction provides higher strength than zinc alloy for larger profile assemblies. Requires two M8 bolts and matching T-nuts.

name: 4040 Inside Corner Bracket, T-Shape
description: Die-cast aluminum T-shaped inside corner bracket for 4040 aluminum extrusion profiles, 3-way T-joint connection, M8 bolt mounting with 3 fastener points, 35x35x50mm heavy-duty three-way frame junctions
designNotes: Heavy-duty inside corner bracket for creating T-junctions with three 4040 extrusions. Die-cast aluminum provides superior strength for large frame assemblies. Three M8 bolt holes for secure three-way connections.

name: M3 Drop-In T-Nut for 2020
description: M3 drop-in T-nut with spring ball for 2020 aluminum extrusion 6mm slot, carbon steel zinc plated, post-assembly insertion, spring-loaded ball retains position in slot channel
designNotes: Drop-in T-nut can be inserted anywhere along the extrusion slot without disassembly. Spring ball mechanism holds the nut in position before tightening, making post-assembly additions convenient.

name: M3 Slide-In T-Nut for 2020
description: M3 slide-in T-nut for 2020 aluminum extrusion 6mm slot, carbon steel zinc plated, pre-assembly insertion from extrusion end, low-profile economical fastener
designNotes: Slide-in T-nut must be inserted from the end of the extrusion before assembly is complete. Cheaper than drop-in style but requires planning during assembly sequence.

designNotes: Drop-in T-nut can be inserted anywhere along the extrusion slot without disassembly. Spring ball mechanism holds the nut in position before tightening, making post-assembly additions convenient. M5 is the standard bolt size for 2020 brackets.

name: 2020 End Cap, Black ABS Plastic
description: Black ABS plastic press-fit end cap for 2020 aluminum extrusion profile, 20x20mm face covers open extrusion end, snap-in installation requires no fasteners
designNotes: Press-fit end cap snaps into the open end of a 2020 extrusion. Provides a clean finished appearance and prevents debris from entering the slot channels. No tools required for installation.

name: 2020 Panel Mounting Clip, 3mm Panel
description: Spring steel zinc plated panel mounting clip for 2020 aluminum extrusion 6mm slot, holds 3mm thick panels, tool-free snap-in installation for acrylic, polycarbonate, or sheet metal panels
designNotes: Spring steel clip snaps into the 6mm T-slot and grips a 3mm panel. No bolts or T-nuts required. Suitable for mounting acrylic, polycarbonate, thin plywood, or sheet metal panels to 2020 extrusion frames.

name: 3030 Panel Mounting Clip, 3mm Panel
description: Spring steel zinc plated panel mounting clip for 3030 aluminum extrusion 8mm slot, holds 3mm thick panels, tool-free snap-in installation for acrylic, polycarbonate, or sheet metal panels
designNotes: Spring steel clip snaps into the 8mm T-slot and grips a 3mm panel. No bolts or T-nuts required. Suitable for mounting acrylic, polycarbonate, thin plywood, or sheet metal panels to 3030 extrusion frames.

name: 2020 Zinc Alloy Hinge
description: Zinc alloy hinge for 2020 aluminum extrusion profiles, 180-degree opening angle, M5 bolt mounting with 4 fastener points (2 per side), 58x30x20mm for doors, panels, and access covers on T-slot frames
designNotes: T-slot compatible hinge for 2020 extrusion frames. Mounts with 4 M5 bolts (2 per side) using standard T-nuts. 180-degree opening angle allows full access to enclosure interiors. Suitable for doors, access panels, and hinged covers.
